habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Electricity (Ex) An electric eel can produce a powerful jolt of electricity from its tail, delivering the jolt with a successful touch attack. On a critical hit, the creature struck must make a DC 15 Fortitude save or be stunned for 1d4 rounds. The save DC is Constitution-based.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Electricity (Ex) An electric eel can produce a powerful jolt of electricity from its tail, delivering the jolt with a successful touch attack. On a critical hit, the creature struck must make a DC 15 Fortitude save or be stunned for 1d4 rounds. The save DC is Constitution-based.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Electric Eel
N Small animal
Init +6
Senses low-light vision; Perception +4
AC 15, touch 13, flat-footed 13 (+2 Dex, +2 natural, +1 size)
hp 17 ((2d8+8))
Fort +7, Ref +5, Will +0
Speed 5 ft., swim 30 ft.
Melee Bite +3 (1d6+1 piercing)
Melee Tail -2 (1d6 electricity)
Special Abilities Electricity (Ex) An electric eel can produce a powerful jolt of electricity from its tail, delivering the jolt with a successful touch attack. On a critical hit, the creature struck must make a DC 15 Fortitude save or be stunned for 1d4 rounds. The save DC is Constitution-based.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 13, Dex 14, Con 19, Int 1, Wis 10, Cha 6
Base Atk +1; CMB +1; CMD 13
